The client sent multiple reminders that he has not received any call after the payment. Upon checking we came t know that the services are activated on 9th and from 10th the WC officer trying to reach him but his number is always not reachable. Welcome call comments: As discussed the client wanted to proceed for a welcome call as we were deducting his 3 months amount of the subscription,
the client planned to continue with the services for initial 3 months. Hence , the welcome call  completed as of now.

13.2.26 : We received an inbound call from the client requesting a refund and repeatedly blaming him . The account was activated on 9th February, and the welcome call was conducted on 10th February 2026 as per the standard process. However, the client stated that he did not receive any call. We clarified that the welcome call was attempted and all support we provided. Despite this clarification, the client maintained that no support had been provided and was unwilling to accept the explanation.

The client asked about the refund process and the refundable amount. As per the policy, it was explained that one quarter of the subscription fee along with the service usage days would be deducted. 

Nervecell Comment:
As discussed, the client agreed to proceed with the welcome call since three months of the subscription fee would be deducted as per policy. The client has planned to continue the services for the initial three months. Accordingly, the welcome call has been completed.

13th Feb 26 -Despite the completion of the welcome call, the client expressed that he does not wish to continue the service and is requesting a refund.

Refund as per refund policy will be processed.
